verified_capabilities: safe repo-local exports for API and UI
Russian and English output generation exists
inferred_capabilities: local recruiter/demo friendliness is a design goal
architecture is intended to stay modular as rules grow
not_verified_capabilities: interactive browser behavior beyond HTML response verification

top_findings.title: Contradiction detection still misses plausible overloaded briefs
top_findings.evidence: Live English and Russian API smoke checks with low budget, short timeline, and web/mobile scope returned 0 contradictions.

top_findings.title: Language-following is partial rather than complete
top_findings.evidence: Russian UI still renders some English labels; /ui/new produced Russian copy with html lang=en.

top_findings.title: Contradiction results can be noisy and duplicative
top_findings.evidence: Stress case output included multiple contradiction entries from the same family instead of one clean diagnosis.

top_findings.title: Artifacts remain useful but still feel prototype-like
top_findings.evidence: Generated markdown is structured and readable, but summary.json is very raw and exported Russian analysis still includes English structural terms.

top_findings.title: Several modules are approaching maintainability hotspots
top_findings.evidence: analysis_decisions.py=441 lines, analysis_signals.py=355, export_render.py=366, intake.py=351, ui/templates/index.html=298.

blockers: Harden contradiction rules so obvious low-budget + short-timeline + multi-platform overload cases do not pass cleanly.
Finish language consistency in UI and exported artifacts.
Reduce duplicate contradiction findings so outputs feel more trustworthy and curated.
recommendations: Add explicit contradiction rules for low budget + short timeline + multi-platform even when broad-scope heuristics do not trigger.
Add audit-focused eval cases that mirror the live misses found in this review.
Localize the remaining hard-coded template strings and fix html lang handling on reset and other no-result pages.
Do a small editorial pass on artifact wording to reduce prototype smell before freezing the repo.
Split analysis_decisions.py before the next feature pass to avoid rule accretion in one file.
